accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.description: You do not have permission to view this page. If you are signed in with a business account, use the business workspace; person accounts use the customer or staff areas.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or was moved.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: The app hit an unexpected error. You can reload or return home.
